exercise_library.name: Incline Push-ups (Desk)
exercise_library.howTo: Hands on desk. Elbows at 45° (A-shape). Core tight.
exercise_library.mistake: Flaring elbows (T-shape) - causes tricep pain.

exercise_library.name: Push-up Negatives
exercise_library.howTo: 5s lowering phase. Use a chair to get back up.
exercise_library.mistake: Dropping too fast; loss of core tension.

exercise_library.name: Incline Diamonds
exercise_library.howTo: Hands touch (diamond shape) on table. Slow eccentric.
exercise_library.mistake: Pushing through sharp elbow pain. Stop if sharp!

exercise_library.name: Active Dead Hangs
exercise_library.howTo: Grip bar. Pull shoulder blades down away from ears.
exercise_library.mistake: Passive hanging; feet touching floor (bend knees).

exercise_library.name: Scapular Pulls
exercise_library.howTo: Hang straight. Lift body 2 inches using back only. Arms straight.
exercise_library.mistake: Bending elbows to cheat the movement.

exercise_library.name: Top-of-Bar Holds
exercise_library.howTo: Chin over bar. Squeeze every muscle. Keep breathing.
exercise_library.mistake: Holding breath (increases internal pressure).

exercise_library.name: Bird-Dogs
exercise_library.howTo: On all fours. Extend opposite arm/leg. Flat back.
exercise_library.mistake: Arching back (causes sharp pain). Keep hips level.

exercise_library.name: Hanging Knee Tucks
exercise_library.howTo: Hang from bar. Slowly lift knees to chest. No swing.
exercise_library.mistake: Using momentum; swinging like a pendulum.

exercise_library.name: Plank
exercise_library.howTo: Straight line head-to-heels. Squeeze glutes hard.
exercise_library.mistake: Sagging hips (hurts lower back). Looking up.

exercise_library.name: Slow Squats
exercise_library.howTo: 3s down, 1s up. Weight on heels. Chest up.
exercise_library.mistake: Rounding back; weight on toes.

exercise_library.name: Walking Lunges
exercise_library.howTo: Large steps. Front knee stays behind toes.
exercise_library.mistake: Banging back knee on floor.

exercise_library.name: Wall Sit
exercise_library.howTo: Back flat against wall. Legs at 90°.
exercise_library.mistake: Resting hands on knees.

exercise_library.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
exercise_library.howTo: Forearm on door frame. Lean forward gently. Feel chest open.
exercise_library.mistake: Aggressive pulling; holding breath.

exercise_library.name: Wall Calf Stretch
exercise_library.howTo: Hands on wall. One foot back, heel down. Lean in.
exercise_library.mistake: Bouncing; lifting the back heel.

exercise_library.name: Tennis Ball Foot Roll
exercise_library.howTo: Tennis ball under foot arch. Roll with light pressure.
exercise_library.mistake: Pressing too hard; causing sharp pain.

exercise_library.name: High Knees
exercise_library.howTo: Drive knees up fast with light, quick steps.
exercise_library.mistake: Landing heavy and leaning too far back.

exercise_library.name: Shadow Boxing (Easy Pace)
exercise_library.howTo: Keep guard up and throw relaxed combos at easy pace.
exercise_library.mistake: Going max intensity during a recovery block.

exercise_library.name: Jumping Jacks
exercise_library.howTo: Touch hands overhead and land softly.
exercise_library.mistake: Stiff knees and noisy, high-impact landings.

exercise_library.name: Mountain Climbers
exercise_library.howTo: Keep shoulders over wrists and drive knees in rhythm.
exercise_library.mistake: Hips too high and lower-back sagging.

exercise_library.name: Burpees (No Push-up)
exercise_library.howTo: Hands down, step or hop back, stand tall, then jump lightly.
exercise_library.mistake: Collapsing chest to floor and losing breathing rhythm.
